calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sammie Dukes in Propria Persona
Mike Freedman for Elizabeth Holman

The Court stated the remaining issue is the allocation of attorneys' fees. He asked Counsel if they had anything to add to their papers. Both Counsel verbally submitted on the papers. Mr. Freedman provides the court with an updated order. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-29-2018 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for Elizabeth Holman (Administrator).
Sammie Dukes former Counsel for Administrator.

Mr. Freedman stated that he believes the only issue is apportionment of the statutory compensation of Counsel, that he proposed a 50/50 split, that when he took this over he discovered failure on two accounts and that there are three related probates with Alicia's property. Mr. Freedman also stated that rather than distributing the real property in kind, the Estate sold the property, spoke of time spent regarding remedy of the capital gains tax and stated that a supplement was filed on Thursday regarding dollar amounts. Mr. Dukes stated that he is requesting extraordinary fees for sale of the property and that he is not satisfied with a 50/50 split. Mr. Freedman stated that he has no problem with Mr. Dukes request for extraordinary fees. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to February 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to submit time sheets.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1482 Revere Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sammie Dukes for Lizz Holman.

The sale was confirmed at $686,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 4, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
